plan.title: docs(security): record 2026-05-12 audit baseline in docs/security.md (parent #1069)

narratives.Description: docs(security): record 2026-05-12 audit baseline in docs/security.md (parent #1069)
narratives.Overview:
## Parent

#1069

## What to build

Wrap-up slice for the supply-chain audit (#1069). After Slices 1-3 (#1070, #1071, #1072) land, add a short baseline note to `docs/security.md` (create the file if it does not yet exist) recording:

- **Audit date:** 2026-05-12
- **Scanners run:** `osv-scanner scan source --recursive`, `trivy fs --severity CRITICAL,HIGH --ignore-unfixed`, `gitleaks detect --redact`
- **Findings resolved:** the 5 items in #1069 (gitleaks PEM fixture, `curl|bash` removed from CI, OSV advisories resolved, `dependabot.yml` landed, Actions pinning + OIDC)
- **Residual risk:** any unfixable OSV advisories documented in Slice 2 (#1071), with rationale
- **Next scheduled audit:** target cadence (e.g. quarterly, or driven by Dependabot signal)

The goal is for future scans to start from a documented baseline so a regression is immediately visible.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `docs/security.md` exists (created or appended) and contains the 2026-05-12 audit baseline section
- [ ] Each of the 5 findings from #1069 has a one-line entry referencing the PR that resolved it
- [ ] Any scanner suppressions added in Slice 2 are cross-referenced from this doc
- [ ] A `## Audit cadence` section names the next scheduled review
- [ ] `task check` passes (markdown lint, if configured, is clean)

## Type

AFK

## Blocked by

- Blocked by #1070 (quick wins must land so the baseline can reference resolved CI/fixture/dependabot state)
- Blocked by #1071 (OSV resolution must land so residual-risk section is accurate)
- Blocked by #1072 (Actions pinning + OIDC must land so the baseline reflects final hardening posture)

references.title: Issue #1073: docs(security): record 2026-05-12 audit baseline in docs/security.md (parent #1069)
